name: Xero South Africa

Compliance.description: SARS VAT compliant, SA-localized payroll via partners, POPIA compliant, no violations.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Capterra 4.4/5 (global, 3K reviews), Trustpilot 3.9/5; SA users praise ease/integrations.

Product Value.description: Starter R260/mo; Standard R450/mo; Premium R720/mo. Good value with unlimited users.

Innovation.description: AI Ledger, 1000+ integrations, bank feeds, Hubdoc, mobile app, real-time reporting.

Customer Support.description: 24/7 online support, Xero community; mixed response time reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: 2FA, role-based access, SSL encryption, ISO 27001, POPIA compliant, no breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Starter R260/mo (20 invoices); Standard R450/mo; Premium R720/mo (multi-currency)

concerns: pricing vs Sage for small users

socialSentiment.summary: Positive globally/SA; praised for integrations/usability; minor support complaints.
